description_long: This stereo sound system features a rectangular, low-profile body with a colorful, grid-patterned surface divided into orange, green, and blue sections. The top face is adorned with a series of large black circular and rectangular elements, likely representing buttons, dials, or speaker grilles, arranged in two parallel rows. The surface also displays subtle line graphics and abstract shapes, adding a modern, artistic flair. The sides are gently rounded, giving the object a sleek, contemporary appearance. No visible display screen or brand logo is present, and the object appears to be constructed primarily from plastic with possible internal metal and electronic components. The overall design suggests a compact, portable stereo system suitable for urban environments.
description: A colorful, rectangular stereo sound system with black circular and rectangular controls on top, featuring a modern, grid-patterned surface and rounded edges.
description_view_0: Front view shows the narrow face with the grid pattern and the arrangement of black controls on the top surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the elongated, low-profile shape and the full array of controls and patterns on the top.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, showing the opposite narrow face and the continuation of the grid and control layout.
description_view_3: Opposite side view displays the full length and the colorful, patterned top with all controls visible.
attribute_speaker_grille_pattern: Rows of large black circles and rectangles on the top surface, arranged in a geometric, grid-like pattern; no mesh or perforation visible.
attribute_control_panel_layout: Two parallel rows of large black circular and rectangular controls on the top surface, evenly spaced, with no visible labels.
